source_jobs.title: Jr. Full Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHY YOU'RE HERE

We’ve launched our public beta with a strong foundation—multiplayer infrastructure, a node-based canvas, and dozens of AI integrations—and we’re growing fast.
You’ll join early as our Junior Full Stack Engineer, working alongside our team to help ship features, improve performance, and learn the systems that power an AI-native creative platform.

This role is perfect for someone who’s built projects end-to-end, loves learning new tools, and wants to grow into a senior engineering position on a product that merges art, design, and technology.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Contribute to feature development across the stack

 - Implement UI components and user interactions in React + TypeScript

 - Support backend endpoints, data models, and APIs

 - Test, debug, and improve performance for real-time workflows

 - Learn from senior engineers while developing ownership over key areas




MUST-HAVE COMPETENCIES

 - 1–3 years of experience (or equivalent personal projects) in full-stack or front-end development

 - Proficiency in React + TypeScript

 - Familiarity with Node, tRPC, or similar frameworks

 - Curiosity about distributed systems or creative/AI tools

 - Understanding of web fundamentals and component architecture

 - Eagerness to learn, iterate, and grow within a small, fast-moving team




NICE-TO-HAVE COMPETENCIES

 - Experience with canvas or node-based tools (React Flow, Blender, WebGPU)

 - Familiarity with creative or AI-driven software

 - Contributions to open-source projects

 - Background or interest in art, design, music, or creative tech




OUR STACK

Frontend: React 19, TypeScript, React Router v7, Zustand, TanStack Query, @xyflow/react, React Aria Components, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, React Three Fiber

Backend: tRPC, Hono, Cloudflare Workers, PostgreSQL (Supabase), Durable Objects, Drizzle ORM, Cloudflare D1, Better Auth, Stripe, AI SDK

Infrastructure: Cloudflare Workers, KV, D1, Hyperdrive, Cron Triggers, Turborepo, pnpm, Node.js 22+

Observability & Tooling: Vite, ESLint, Prettier, Husky, Zod, Sentry, PostHog




HOW WE WORK

 - Hybrid, flexible, async-friendly — based in LA with 2 in-office days each week.

 - Creative-first culture — we care about accessibility, design, and feel.

 - High trust, high standards — ownership early, autonomy always.

 - Small team, big impact — every commit shapes the future of the product.




COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

 - $70K–$90K USD depending on experience (equity included)

 - Healthcare, dental, vision, and 401(k)

 - Flexible hours and focus on deep work

 - Generous equity and real product ownership

 - Mentorship and leadership growth as we scale




HOW WE INTERVIEW

 1. Intro Call – Meet one or two of us to talk about your background, our mission, and how we work.

 2. Technical Conversation – Complete a live technical assessment based on a real-world problem followed by a discussion on your approach to architecture, problem-solving, and building for usability.

 3. Technical Take-home – A scoped technical project with compensation

 4. Team Conversation – Meet with core team and have a discussion about collaboration, culture, and long-term vision.



We welcome candidates who may not have the “right” title but have the skills, mindset, and drive to thrive here.


AT FUSER, THE PROCESS IS THE POINT.

Fuser is a creative technology company founded by artists, educators, and engineers. We’re building tools for professionals who ideate, orchestrate, and deliver with intention. Our flagship product is a collaborative canvas for working across text, image, video, audio, and 3D, powered by the latest AI models.

We’re a small team in Los Angeles designing the future of creative software: joyful, intuitive, and powerful tools for real-world storytelling and production.

source_jobs.title: Sr. Full Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHY YOU'RE HERE

As a Sr. Full Stack Engineer, you'll operate with autonomy in a small, fast-moving team, working directly with the CTO and founding product engineer to scale Fuser’s core platform. This is a hands-on engineering role — you will spend most of your time designing, coding, and shipping features across the stack.

We’ve launched our public beta with a strong foundation — 100k+ lines of code, multiplayer infrastructure, a node-based canvas, and dozens of AI integrations. Now we’re building toward collaboration, subgraphs, post-production, and operation nodes. You’ll help ship features, shape abstractions, and keep Fuser fast, stable, and expressive for creative professionals.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and ship key features across the stack with the founding team

 - Own complex systems such as multiplayer, asset pipelines, or execution flows

 - Architect clean, scalable abstractions that simplify complexity without limiting control

 - Improve performance, reliability, and developer experience

 - Help define the architecture for future AI-native UI/UX patterns

 - Collaborate tightly with design and product — we move quickly and iterate often





WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 5+ years of experience shipping full-stack applications

 - Strong skills in React + TypeScript, with backend depth in Node, tRPC, or Cloudflare Workers

 - Understanding of distributed or real-time systems

 - Experience designing APIs, databases, and data flows

 - Curiosity about creative tools, design systems, or AI interfaces

 - A builder mindset — you enjoy coding daily and owning your work end-to-end

Bonus Points For:

 - Experience with canvas or node-based tools (React Flow, Three.js, WebGPU)

 - Familiarity with AI or creative software

 - Open-source contributions or creative coding background




OUR STACK

Frontend: React 19, React Router 7, Zustand, React Flow, Three.js
Backend: Cloudflare Workers, tRPC, Drizzle ORM, PartyKit, Durable Objects
Database & Storage: Supabase (PostgreSQL), R2
AI Integrations: 50+ APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Runway, FAL, and more)




HOW WE WORK

 - Remote-friendly — we welcome candidates anywhere in the U.S.

 - LA-based core team — the team works hybrid, and you’ll collaborate remotely via async tools, Slack, and regular touchpoints.

 - Optional in-person team weeks — in Los Angeles for planning, onboarding, or deep collaboration.

 - Creative-first culture — we care about accessibility, design, and feel.

 - High trust, high standards — ownership early, autonomy always.

 - Small team, big impact — every commit shapes the future of the product.




COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

 - $80K–$180K USD depending on experience and zone (equity included)

 - Signing bonus upon joining

 - Healthcare, dental, vision, and 401(k) (U.S. only)

 - Flexible hours and focus on deep work

 - Generous equity and real product ownership

 - Mentorship and leadership growth as we scale while staying hands-on




HOW WE INTERVIEW

 1. Intro Call – Meet one or two of us to talk about your background, our mission, and how we work.

 2. Technical Conversation – Complete a live technical assessment based on a real-world problem followed by a discussion on your approach to architecture, problem-solving, and building for usability.

 3. Technical Demo – A scoped technical project with compensation

 4. Team Conversation – Meet with core team and have a discussion about collaboration, culture, and long-term vision.

We welcome candidates who may not have the “right” title but have the skills, mindset, and drive to thrive here.

Our flagship product is a collaborative canvas for working across text, image, video, audio, and 3D, powered by the latest AI models.

source_jobs.title: Creative Design Intern
source_jobs.description:
WHY YOU’RE HERE

As a Creative Design Intern, you’ll explore the edge between design, technology, and storytelling. You’ll use Fuser to create generative visuals, experimental workflows, visual media, and content that reveal what AI-native creativity can look like.

You’ll collaborate closely with our Head of Creative Deployment, Head of Growth & Marketing, and Product Team to translate experiments into tangible work for the Fuser community. You’ll be encouraged to experiment — using Fuser itself to generate assets, workflows, and visual ideas that inform our evolving brand.

 


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Create visual content across formats — images, graphics, video, social assets, and more

 - Prototype new visual ideas using Fuser, AI models, and generative software

 - Create tutorials and showcases that demonstrate Fuser workflows

 - Develop creative prompts, templates, or assets for the community

 - Produce content used for ads, launches, social media, etc

 - Present experiments during weekly reviews and document your process

 


MUST-HAVE COMPETENCIES

 - Experience with at least one of: Blender, Houdini, Runway, TouchDesigner, p5.js, or HTML/CSS/JS

 - Proficiency in Figma or Illustrator

 - Interest in generative art, AI, and creative coding

 - Strong aesthetic eye and interest in design

 - Curiosity about human–machine collaboration and design systems

 - Strong visual communication and storytelling skills

 - Organized, self-directed, and eager to learn

 


NICE-TO-HAVE COMPETENCIES

 - Experience integrating APIs or AI models into creative projects

 - Comfort sharing process publicly through tutorials or posts

 - Desire to teach or document creative workflows

 


HOW WE WORK

In Person — based in Frogtown, LA with at least two days in office each week.

Creative-first culture — we care about accessibility, design, and feel.

High trust, high standards — ownership early, autonomy always.

Small team, big impact — every visual shapes how people experience Fuser.

 


COMPENSATION & DURATION

 - $1,850/month, equivalent to approximately $21–24/hour based on an expected schedule of 18–20 hours per week.

 - $500/month in Fuser generation credits

 - 3/6-month internship with potential for full-time conversion

 - Flexible schedule and weekly mentorship

 


HOW WE INTERVIEW

 - Intro Call – Meet Laure or a founder to discuss your interests and background.

 - Take Home – A paid take-home pilot so we get to know you and your design skills better.

 - Team Conversation – Discuss collaboration, learning goals, and next steps.

 
 


AT FUSER, THE PROCESS IS THE POINT.

Fuser is a creative technology company founded by artists, educators, and engineers. We’re building tools for professionals who ideate, orchestrate, and deliver with intention. Our flagship product is a collaborative canvas for working across text, image, video, audio, and 3D, powered by the latest AI models.

We’re a small team in Los Angeles designing the future of creative software: joyful, intuitive, and powerful tools for real-world storytelling and production.

source_jobs.title: Brand & Motion Design Intern
source_jobs.description:
WHY YOU’RE HERE

As a Brand & Motion Design Intern, you’ll help define how Fuser looks, moves, and communicates. You’ll design campaign visuals, product announcements, brand assets, and short-form motion pieces that capture Fuser’s energy and clarity.

You’ll collaborate closely with our Head of Creative Deployment, Head of Growth & Marketing, and Product Team. You’ll be encouraged to experiment — using Fuser itself to generate assets, workflows, and visual ideas that inform our brand.

 


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Design and produce marketing visuals, launch campaigns, product updates, and brand assets

 - Create short-form videos, animations, and tutorials using Fuser and motion tools

 - Contribute to brand systems, layout templates, and creative direction

 - Explore generative and AI-assisted visuals to extend Fuser’s identity

 - Collaborate across teams to connect storytelling, motion, brand, and product features

 - Participate in weekly reviews while maintaining creative autonomy

 


MUST-HAVE COMPETENCIES

 - Proficiency in Figma and Photoshop and at least one motion tool: After Effects, Cavalry, Rive, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve

 - Solid graphic design fundamentals — typography, layout, color, hierarchy.

 - Interest and experience in AI /creative tools (Fuser, Runway, Kling, Midjourney, etc.)

 - Organized, self-driven, and comfortable with feedback

 


NICE-TO-HAVE COMPETENCIES

 - Experience with Blender, TouchDesigner, or Rive

 - Basic understanding of HTML/CSS/JS for responsive layouts

 - Knowledge of generative design or procedural animation

 - Editing or post-production experience for social-media content

 - Illustration, photography, or creative-direction background

 - Has a deep respect for typeface design

 


HOW WE WORK

In Person — based in Frogtown, LA with at least two days in office each week.

Creative-first culture — we care about accessibility, design, and feel.

High trust, high standards — ownership early, autonomy always.

Small team, big impact — every visual shapes how people experience Fuser.

 


COMPENSATION & DURATION

 - $1,850/month, equivalent to approximately $21–24/hour based on an expected schedule of 18–20 hours per week.

 - $500/month in Fuser generation credits

 - 3/6-month internship with potential for full-time conversion

 - Flexible schedule and weekly mentorship

 


HOW WE INTERVIEW

 - Intro Call – Meet Laure or a founder to discuss your interests and background.

 - Take Home – A paid take-home pilot so we get to know you and your design skills better.

 - Team Conversation – Discuss collaboration, learning goals, and next steps.

 

We’re looking for emerging designers who think in movement and systems — creators who want to use Fuser to shape the next language of motion and brand storytelling.

 
 


AT FUSER, THE PROCESS IS THE POINT.

Our flagship product is a collaborative canvas for working across text, image, video, audio, and 3D, powered by the latest AI models.

source_jobs.title: Creative Solutions Manager
source_jobs.description:
WHY YOU’RE HERE

You’ve worked in production and know the realities of building campaigns, assets, and content—across studios, agencies, or independent teams.

You’re entrepreneurial by nature, the kind of person who sees both the creative potential and operational pain points inside a workflow—and knows how to fix them.

At Fuser, you’ll translate technical capabilities into creative outcomes. You’ll run demos, build relationships, and help studios, agencies, and artists see exactly how Fuser makes their work faster, smarter, and more intentional.

This isn’t a standard SDR or AE position. It’s a hybrid creative, technical, and relational role for someone who can think like a producer, speak like a technologist, and sell like a storyteller.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own the full sales pipeline—from outreach to closing

 - Identify and engage studios, agencies, and creative teams

 - Develop and run tailored demos showing Fuser in action

 - Translate client goals into custom AI workflows (nodes, generation, automation)

 - Collaborate with Product to share client feedback and shape features

 - Partner with Marketing to craft decks, case studies, and creative use-case materials

 - Build and nurture long-term relationships with partners and clients

 - Track performance and outreach metrics in our CRM




WHAT YOU BRING

 - Proven experience in production, creative technology, or SaaS sales

 - Understanding of how media and content are produced—from concept to delivery

 - Fluency with creative tools (Adobe Suite, Figma, ComfyUI, Davinci Resolve, Nuke, C4D/Maya/Blender, UE4/Unity etc.)

 - Familiarity with APIs, AI models, or automation (Zapier, n8n, etc.)

 - Strong communicator who can simplify complex ideas for creative audiences

 - Entrepreneurial energy—self-directed, curious, solutions-oriented

 - Comfortable running client calls, demos, and negotiations




COMPENSATION & INCENTIVES

 - Base/Retainer: $4K–$6K/month commensurate with experience, plus commission and equity

 - Tiered bonuses for strategic wins (studio onboarding, partnerships, or showcases)

 - Quarterly performance incentives tied to ecosystem growth and engagement

 - Opportunity for retainer adjustment as pipeline and accounts expand

 - Paid travel or event participation for industry conferences and showcases




HOW WE WORK

 - Hybrid, flexible, async-friendly—based in LA with remote option for exceptional candidates

 - Creative-first culture—accessibility, design, and feel matter

 - High trust, high standards—ownership early, autonomy always

 - Small team, big impact—every relationship you build shapes Fuser’s future




HOW WE INTERVIEW

 1. Intro Conversation – Meet with leadership to talk about your background in production, creative tech, and client development.

 2. Demo & Strategy Discussion – Walk us through how you’d present Fuser to a studio or creative team.

 3. Paid Pilot (2 Weeks) – Collaborate with us on a short strategy sprint: identify prospects, design a mini-demo or sales approach, and present your findings. (You’ll be compensated for your time.)

 4. Final Conversation – Review your process, insights, and long-term fit.




WHY JOIN US

If you’ve worked in production, you know how fragmented creative workflows can be. Fuser is building the bridge—connecting creativity and technology in one collaborative space.
Join us to help studios, artists, and agencies discover a better way to work—and help define how creative AI tools are sold, understood, and adopted worldwide.


AT FUSER, THE PROCESS IS THE POINT.

Our flagship product is a collaborative canvas for working across text, image, video, audio, and 3D, powered by the latest AI models.

We’re a small team in Los Angeles designing the future of creative software: joyful, intuitive, and powerful tools fo

notes: Early-stage startup with a strong engineering focus, AI-native creative platform
